name: submodel

dataResidency.euRegionDetails: The provider's public status page lists active data center / availability zones in Hong Kong (HK-KS-1 and HK-DU-2). No primary-source documentation found for any EU region or EU-only routing option.

notes: Very limited primary-source compliance information was publicly discoverable from the provider's own documentation. Public evidence supports Hong Kong processing locations on the status page, but no privacy policy, DPA, sub-processor list, retention policy, training policy, SCC statement, security certifications, or EU AI Act statement could be confirmed from primary sources, so those fields are left null or marked unavailable.
